description_long: This object is a compact, oval-shaped electronic device with a smooth, glossy white plastic exterior and a black display panel on top. The display features bright blue digital readouts, showing values for SpO2 percentage and pulse rate, suggesting it is a fingertip pulse oximeter. The device has a clamshell design with a visible hinge on the side and a blue-tinted inner section, likely where the finger is inserted for measurement. A single prominent button is located on the top surface, used to operate the device. The overall form is ergonomic, designed to comfortably fit a human finger, and the device is small enough to be easily portable.
description: A small, white and black fingertip pulse oximeter with a digital display and a single button, designed for measuring blood oxygen and pulse rate. It features a clamshell design with a blue-tinted finger slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display with SpO2 and pulse rate readings, and the main button on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hinge mechanism and the layered clamshell structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the blue-tinted finger slot and the smooth, rounded back surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the hinge and the blue-tinted slot partially visible.
